chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2.4.0(jdk8/11), the project enhances workflow to mimic DingTalk and Feishu modes. It includes optimizations for multi-tenant table handling, sorting field conversion, big screen feature updates, S3 Minio SDK replacement with AWS SDK, and tenant package name duplicate validation. The Vue3 admin UI upgrades form-create plugin, replaces @import with @use for Sass, supports TagsView with same path but different fullPath, and adds custom directives. The uniapp admin UI introduces dual token refresh, login interface, third-party login, user management, personal info, role management, my interface, workflow list and detail, personal center, approval pass/reject interfaces, and fixes Android white screen issue with useDictStore().

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2.4.1(jdk17/21), the project adds more workflow features including signature, delay timer, trigger, routing branch, and more. The Vue3 admin UI adds file list copy link, SMS password reset, virtualized tree control for menu management, Vite CJS deprecation warning fix, InEnum generic type optimization, and simplified sliding desensitization handler. The BPM workflow area introduces SIMPLE designer enhancements: delay timer, trigger, task approval listener, routing branch, signature, and option to require approval comments. It also adds BPMN designer skip expression, process model copy function, and optimizes process model editing.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2.4.1(jdk8/11), the project adds more workflow features including signature, delay timer, trigger, routing branch, and more. The Vue3 admin UI adds file list copy link, SMS password reset, virtualized tree control for menu management, Vite CJS deprecation warning fix, InEnum generic type optimization, and simplified sliding desensitization handler. The BPM workflow area introduces SIMPLE designer enhancements: delay timer, trigger, task approval listener, routing branch, signature, and option to require approval comments. It also adds BPMN designer skip expression, process model copy function, and optimizes process model editing.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2.4.2(jdk8/11), the project adds an initial IoT module MVP supporting product, device, and thing model management with basic device uplink/downlink capabilities and TDEngine time-series storage. It introduces Vben5.0 + Antd admin UI with code generation, and optimizes BPM workflow. The Vue3 admin UI adds dynamic form event configuration and loading feedback for code generation import. The Vben5.0 + Antd admin UI adds tenant, SMS, mail, notify, and code generation features. The BPM workflow area adds SIMPLE designer handling node, trigger data modification/deletion/HTTP async request, flowchart hand tool, batch field permission setting, and sub-process.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2.5.0(jdk17/21), the project supports Vben5.0 + antd admin UI, adds Cloud standalone startup mode, and supports WeChat latest transfer and public key payment. New features include AWS SDK 1.x to 2.x migration, system config for user registration, third-party login refactoring with justauth 1.16.7, captcha refactoring with aj-captcha 1.4.0, Redis Stream cleanup job, file upload API with directory parameter, REPORT dashboard designer and auto-login, microservice standalone mode, and MPJLambdaWrapperX enhancement. The Vue3 admin UI adds tenant switching and fixes theme hover color. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI adds schema code generation with master-sub table support, Description component, personal center/SSO/third-party login, formCreate, antd standard code generation, and workflow migration for user group, process listener, process expression, and process instance.

chunks.title: v2.6.0(jdk8/11)：大大简化单体项目的复杂性，完善 Vben5.0 + antd 管理后台
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro
Release: v2.6.0(jdk8/11)：大大简化单体项目的复杂性，完善 Vben5.0 + antd 管理后台
Tag: v2.6.0(jdk8/11); draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2025-06-07T10:08:02Z; created_at: 2025-06-07T10:08:01Z
Release notes:
### 📈 Statistic
* 总代码行数：259194
* 源码代码行数：160825
* 注释行数：59546
* 单元测试用例数：1121
### ⭐ New Features
* 【重构】yudao-common 增加 biz 包，将 framework 依赖的 api 统一迁移，方便后续 yudao-framework 独立仓库，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献 [#1343](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/pulls/1343/)、[#192](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/yudao-cloud/pulls/192)
* 【重构】ruoyi-vue-pro 单体项目，移除 api module，简化项目结构，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献 [#1347](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/pulls/1347)
* 【重构】yudao-cloud 微服务项目，将 biz 重命名为 server，定义更清晰，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献 [#1347](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/pulls/1347)
* 【新增】代码生成时，支持配置返回 DO 还是 VO，提升开发效率，，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献 [501cfe5](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/commit/501cfe5afa7fc951e8d92dcdb80bfc8a5406543a)
* 【新增】代码生成时，支持批量删除，由 [@puhui999](https://gitee.com/puhui999) 贡献 [#194](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vben/pulls/104)、[#1348](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/pulls/1348/)、[#112](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vben/pulls/112)、[#1350](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/pulls/1350)
Vben5.0 + antd 管理后台专区：
* 【迁移】工作流：流程实例，由 [@子夜](https://gitee.com/ziye2017) 贡献 [#102](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vben/pulls/102/)、[#103](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vben/pulls/103)
* 【迁移】工作流：流程模型，由 [@Jason](https://gitee.com/jason-zhou) 贡献 [#105](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vben/pulls/105/)、[#107](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vben/pulls/107/)、[#108](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vben/pulls/108/)
* 【新增】TableAction，和 Vben2.0 使用体验保持一致，由 [@xingyuv](https://gitee.com/xingyuv) 贡献
Vben5.0 + element-plus 管理后台专区：
* 【迁移】基础设施 infra 模块，由 [@puhui999](https://gitee.com/puhui999) 贡献 [#194](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vben/pulls/104)
Vben5.0 + naive 管理后台专区：
* 【迁移】系统功能 system 模块、基础设施 infra 模块，由 [@xingyuv](https://gitee.com/xingyuv) 贡献
### 🐞 Bug Fixes
MALL 商城专区：
* 【修复】响应拦截器"showError为false"时弹报错信息，条件不符逻辑，由 [@SuchJack](https://gitee.com/SuchJack) 贡献 [#149](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-mall-uniapp/pulls/149/files)
BPM 工作流专区：
* 【修复】当流程 ID 配置没有中缀的时候不设置过期时间，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献 [#848](https://github.com/YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro/pull/848)
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2.6.0(jdk8/11), the project greatly simplifies the complexity of the monolithic project and improves the Vben5.0 + antd admin UI. Refactoring includes adding biz package to yudao-common, removing api module from ruoyi-vue-pro, renaming biz to server in yudao-cloud, and code generation enhancements for returning DO or VO and batch deletion. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI migrates workflow process instance and process model, and adds TableAction. The Vben5.0 + element-plus admin UI migrates infrastructure infra module. The Vben5.0 + naive admin UI migrates system and infra modules. Bug fixes include mall response interceptor showError logic and BPM process ID expiration setting.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2.6.0(jdk17/21), the project greatly simplifies the complexity of the monolithic project and improves the Vben5.0 + antd admin UI. Refactoring includes adding biz package to yudao-common, removing api module from ruoyi-vue-pro, renaming biz to server in yudao-cloud, and code generation enhancements for returning DO or VO and batch deletion. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI migrates workflow process instance and process model, and adds TableAction. The Vben5.0 + element-plus admin UI migrates infrastructure infra module. The Vben5.0 + naive admin UI migrates system and infra modules. Bug fixes include mall response interceptor showError logic and BPM process ID expiration setting.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2.6.1(jdk8/11), the Vben5 + antd admin UI supports BPM workflow and CRM customer management. New features include batch deletion in code generation, batch delete API, SQL conversion tool UNIQUE KEY support, dict refresh button in code generation config, and Vue2 admin UI tenant switching. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI migrates payment module (app info, payment order, refund order, transfer order, access example), workflow (task approval, DingTalk/Feishu model designer, sub-process), member center, CRM customer management (except statistics), and adds AI large model. It also optimizes payment notification callback log display and removes apps doc alert.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2025.08(jdk8/11), the project improves vben5(antd) workflow, migrates vben5(ep) mall, and supports IoT TCP protocol. Optimizations include disabling easy-trans by default, database connection pool config, log format fix, weakening skywalking dependency, not introducing spring-boot-admin by default, adding @InDict annotation, replacing easyExcel with fastExcel, Excel export auto column width, sql/tools error output to stderr, and vben5 code generation path display. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI adds ERP home page adaptation and purchase order, and fixes VbenTree loading order. The Vben5.0 + element-plus admin UI migrates MALL. The MALL area adds phone number highlight in logistics, shop decoration search box and scan icon. The BPM workflow area adds simple designer userTask skip expression. The Pay area adds userid/usertype and permission check. Bug fixes include websocket manual close, EChart async loading, and CacheRequestBodyFilter issue.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2025.09(jdk8/11), the project adds AI support for web search, reasoning, file/image, MCP, and improves IoT scene linkage. New features include HTTP API request encryption/decryption, S3 private bucket access, CommonResult/PageResult property order optimization, alphanumeric captcha component, email CC/BCC support, MaxUploadSizeExceededException handling, OAuth2.0 client credentials mode, BlockAttackInnerInterceptor, @PermitAll/@TenantIgnore interface-level support. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI migrates ERP functions, improves BPM workflow, and upgrades vben5.5.9. The Vben5.0 + element-plus admin UI optimizes delete operations and mall mobile component code structure. The MALL area adds automatic tenant matching by H5 domain/WeChat mini program. The BPM workflow area adds approval task withdrawal by approver and optimizes approver self-selection data sharing.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2025.09(jdk17/21), the project adds AI support for web search, reasoning, file/image, MCP, and improves IoT scene linkage. New features include HTTP API request encryption/decryption, S3 private bucket access, CommonResult/PageResult property order optimization, alphanumeric captcha component, email CC/BCC support, MaxUploadSizeExceededException handling, OAuth2.0 client credentials mode, BlockAttackInnerInterceptor, @PermitAll/@TenantIgnore interface-level support. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI migrates ERP functions, improves BPM workflow, and upgrades vben5.5.9. The Vben5.0 + element-plus admin UI optimizes delete operations and mall mobile component code structure. The MALL area adds automatic tenant matching by H5 domain/WeChat mini program. The BPM workflow area adds approval task withdrawal by approver and optimizes approver self-selection data sharing.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2025.10(jdk8/11), the project adds workflow order printing, optimizes IoT scene linkage, and improves vben5 antd and vben versions. Optimizations include ftp/sftp, code generation templates for vben, and custom database script parameter conversion. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI optimizes frontend code quality, completes CRM migration, adds ERP/PAY/MEMBER migration, supports BPMN designer for workflow, and partially migrates IOT. The Vben5.0 + element-plus admin UI optimizes schema template, adds PAY/MEMBER migration. The BPM workflow area optimizes rollback operation prediction, adds process printing, and optimizes initiator-based prediction. The IoT area improves scene linkage. Bug fixes include JacksonTypeHandler String issue, XXL-Job multi-tenant task issue, and others.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2025.11(jdk8/11), the project greatly improves vben5 antd and vben versions and optimizes overall stability. Optimizations include Vben5.0 code generator for antd/ele, LocalDateTime formatting fix, selectJoinPage with sort parameter, compatibility with Kingdee/TongTech war, and convertor.py mall conversion. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI adds Description component refactoring, IoT partial migration, Mall product migration, Mall customer service module migration, BPM partial migration, MP partial migration, and completes ERP/CRM migration. The Vben5.0 + element-plus admin UI adds Description component refactoring and Mall partial migration.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2025.12(jdk8/11), the project greatly greatly improves vben5 antd and vben versions and adds admin uniapp vue3 version. New features include file storage region input, enhanced email template parameter parsing, and spring boot admin default login. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI adds MP partial migration, Mall product migration, BPM optimization, IoT partial migration, and fixes BPM designer user task data query issue. The Vben5.0 + element-plus admin UI adds MP partial migration, Mall product migration, and BPM optimization. The BPM workflow area optimizes bpmn designer message/signal ID generation, adds service task execution type, optimizes multi-instance behavior initialization, and adds business form process re-initiation. The AI large model area adds intelligent document slicing strategy.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2025.12(jdk17/21), the project greatly greatly improves vben5 antd and vben versions and adds admin uniapp vue3 version. New features include file storage region input, enhanced email template parameter parsing, and spring boot admin default login. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI adds MP partial migration, Mall product migration, BPM optimization, IoT partial migration, and fixes BPM designer user task data query issue. The Vben5.0 + element-plus admin UI adds MP partial migration, Mall product migration, and BPM optimization. The BPM workflow area optimizes bpmn designer message/signal ID generation, adds service task execution type, optimizes multi-instance behavior initialization, and adds business form process re-initiation. The AI large model area adds intelligent document slicing strategy.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2026.01(jdk8/11), the project greatly greatly greatly improves vben5 antd and vben versions and adds various IoT access protocols. New features include frontend manuals for Vben5.X and Admin Uniapp, email attachment support, and MPJLambdaWrapperX ascending sort extension. The Vben5.0 + antd admin UI adds menu query parameter/iframe support, migrates remaining mall and workflow, migrates IoT, refactors IoT device API, and adds form designer UserSelect/DeptSelect default selection. The Vben5.0 + element-plus admin UI migrates remaining mall and workflow, and adds form designer UserSelect/DeptSelect. The Vue3 admin UI optimizes copy compatibility and adds form designer UserSelect/DeptSelect. The BPM workflow area optimizes parallel/serial multi-instance behavior. The AI area fixes swagger-annotation version conflict. The MALL area adds default spec selection and optimizes order log aspect. The Admin Uniapp area migrates workflow and fixes BPM list height. The IoT area adds data flow destination TCP/WebSocket config, device positioning, and gateway device dynamic registration.

The Vue3 admin UI optimizes copy compatibility and adds form designer UserSelect/DeptSelect. The BPM workflow area optimizes parallel/serial multi-instance behavior. The AI area fixes swagger-annotation version conflict. The MALL area adds default spec selection and optimizes order log aspect. The Admin Uniapp area migrates workflow and fixes BPM list height. The IoT area adds data flow destination TCP/WebSocket config, device positioning, and gateway device dynamic registration.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2026.03(jdk8/11), the project adds MES manufacturing execution system and IoT Modbus protocol access. New features include IoT and MES development guides, dynamic form iframe and region selector components, and IPUtils/AreaUtils static block optimization. The Vben5.0 + element-plus and Vue3 admin UIs optimize overall architecture stability. The BPM workflow area adds Dameng database (DM8) adaptation for Flowable 7.2.0. The MES area adds home page statistics, basic data, production management, warehouse management, quality management, equipment management, tool management, and scheduling management. The IoT area adds Modbus protocol (TCP Client/Server) and refactors MQTT/HTTP/TCP/UDP/WebSocket/CoAP/EMQX protocol configurations. Bug fixes include S3 filename plus sign pre-signed URL decoding, Vben5 avatar upload loading issue, mall distribution withdrawal bank name storage, order item price calculation, Admin Uniapp login redirect logic, and BPM serial multi-instance approver order uncertainty.

* 【优化】代码生成器 `CodegenBuilder` 注释中英文引号转中文引号的实现，并补充单测，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献 [3078fe3](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/commit/3078fe33907ce889747270ee82757a38cdb0d65f)
* 【优化】`HttpUtils.replaceUrlQuery` 改用 hutool `UrlQuery#remove` 替换反射实现，并补充单测，由 [@lliyueling](https://gitee.com/lliyueling) 贡献 [#248](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/yudao-cloud/pulls/248)
* 【新增】区域数据 `area.csv` 补全最新地名，并补充 `AreaUtils` 单测，由 [@chenchenche](https://gitee.com/chenchenche) 贡献 [#247](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/yudao-cloud/pulls/247)
* 【新增】代码生成器支持 Excel 导入功能，覆盖后端及 Vue2 / Vue3 / Vben2 / Vben5 全部前端模板，由 [@itkdm](https://github.com/itkdm) 贡献 [#1082](https://github.com/YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro/pull/1082)、[#1083](https://github.com/YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro/pull/1083)
* 【优化】代码生成器 Excel 导入：新增 `yudao.codegen.import-enable` 全局开关（默认关闭）；Vue3 / Vben5 Schema 抽出独立 `ImportForm` 组件对齐 `user` 模块；补齐 Vben5 antd / ele × general / schema 共 4 套 frontType 单元测试与 `importEnable=true` 断言覆盖，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献 [40d2882](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/commit/40d2882)

* 【新增】IoT 数据流转新增 MQTT 与 Database 两种 Action 实现，由 [@puhui999](https://gitee.com/puhui999) 贡献 [d668af1](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/commit/d668af19b72c29ac2f09adaf64368ae93dc3f4ca)
* 【新增】Vue3 管理后台 IoT 数据流转 Database 数据目的的配置表单，含建表 SQL 提示与一键复制，由 [@puhui999](https://gitee.com/puhui999) 贡献 [#867](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vue3/pulls/867)

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2026.04(jdk17/21), the project adds code generator Excel import and enhances IoT scene linkage and data flow. New features include token cleanup scheduled task, UserSelectV2 layout optimization, upload file path suffix as directory switch, code generator comment quote conversion, HttpUtils.replaceUrlQuery optimization, area data completion, code generator Excel import with global switch and frontend templates, IoT scene linkage alarm message sending (SMS/email/station letter), IoT data flow MQTT and Database actions, Vue3 IoT data flow Database config form, BPM condition node 'contains'/'not contains' operators, AI knowledge base segment delete API, and AI Tongyi Qianwen multimodal model support. Bug fixes include tenant get-by-website port regex, Vue3 response interceptor code 0 logic, request interceptor isToken semantics, and Vue2 debounce parameter issue.

chunks.title: v2026.05(jdk8/11)：新增 WMS 仓储管理系统，完成 Vben5 IoT/MES/WMS 双端适配
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro
Release: v2026.05(jdk8/11)：新增 WMS 仓储管理系统，完成 Vben5 IoT/MES/WMS 双端适配
Tag: v2026.05(jdk8/11); draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2026-05-31T14:12:26Z; created_at: 2026-05-31T14:12:24Z
Release notes:
### 📈 Statistic
* 总代码行数：407736
* 源码代码行数：255592
* 注释行数：91306
* 单元测试用例数：2016
### ⭐ New Features
后端框架专区：
* 【优化】简化 API 访问日志读取请求体逻辑，复用 `ServletUtils.getBody(...)` 内部 JSON 请求判断，避免重复判断，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献 [ff8a524](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/commit/ff8a52418b527b2971118737c23bb5d15d6f3d9b)，由 [@anaer](https://github.com/anaer) 反馈 [#304](https://github.com/YunaiV/yudao-cloud/issues/304)
* 【新增】MyBatis 查询封装新增 `likeRightIfPresent(...)`，支持非空字符串右模糊条件拼接，由 [@wuKong](https://gitee.com/wuKongD) 贡献 [#251](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/yudao-cloud/pulls/251)
* 【新增】新增 [master-jdk21](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/tree/master-jdk21) 分支，支持 Spring Boot 4.X 体验，由 [@xingyu](https://gitee.com/xingyuv) 贡献
WMS 仓储管理专区：
* 【新增】WMS 仓储管理系统，覆盖仓库、商品/SKU、往来企业等基础资料；支持库存统计、库存流水、入库单、出库单、移库单、盘库单、网页打印和首页基础报表，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献
* 【新增】《WMS 手册》，覆盖功能开启、基础资料、库存管理、入库/出库/移库/盘库，以及 WMS、MES、ERP 对比说明，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献
IoT 物联网专区：
* 【新增】IoT 告警配置支持按接收方式动态选择短信、邮件、站内信模板，并在触发告警时按配置的模板编码发送，不再依赖固定 `templateCode`，由 [@熊猫大侠](https://gitee.com/pandadx) 贡献 [#1540](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/ruoyi-vue-pro/pulls/1540)
* 【新增】IoT MessageBus 支持 RabbitMQ 实现，可通过 `yudao.iot.message-bus.type=rabbitmq` 接入 RabbitMQ 进行设备消息发布订阅，由 [@灬霍霍](https://gitee.com/mvcdoc) 贡献 [#253](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/yudao-cloud/pulls/253)
Vben5.0 管理后台专区：
* 【迁移】WMS 模块完成 web-antd / web-ele 双端迁移，覆盖 WMS 首页、基础资料、库存统计/流水、入库/出库/移库/盘库的列表、表单、详情、选择器、图表和打印预览，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献
* 【迁移】MES 模块完成 web-antd / web-ele 双端迁移，覆盖 MES 首页、基础资料、排班日历、生产工单/排产/报工、质量检验、设备点检维修、工装管理等页面的列表、表单、详情、选择器、图表和甘特排产，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献
* 【迁移】IoT 模块完成 web-antd / web-ele 双端迁移，覆盖 IoT 首页、产品分类、产品管理、物模型、设备分组、设备管理、告警配置/记录、OTA 固件/任务、数据流转规则和场景联动，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献
* 【新增】代码生成器新增 Vben5.0 Antdv Next Schema 和标准前端模板，由 [@XuZhiqiang](https://gitee.com/xzq0723) 贡献 [#252](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya/yudao-cloud/pulls/252)
* 【增强】Vben5 管理后台 web-antd / web-ele / web-antdv-next 的流程实例打印支持更多表单字段展示，包括字典选择器、用户/部门/省市区选择器、日期时间、文件、图片、开关和富文本等字段；普通文本和流程记录使用安全文本渲染，避免被当成 HTML 注入，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献 [4ba9390](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vben/commit/4ba9390f2556eca1e81e8d27948b833b7e2be27f)、[099d480](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vben/commit/099d480ff45c0326b34aa7183a95559d6ef0ecdb)，对应 [!347](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vben/pulls/347)
Vue3 + element-plus 管理后台专区：
* 【优化】升级 Vue3 管理后台核心前端依赖，适配 Vite 8、Vue 3.5、Element Plus 2.13、TypeScript 6 等版本，由 [@邓超](https://github.com/DevDengChao) 贡献 [#215](https://github.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vue3/pull/215)
* 【优化】统一格式化 Vue3 管理后台组件、IoT、AI、MP、MES、Mall、BPM 等模块代码，清理 ESLint、Prettier、Stylelint 风格问题，由 [@邓超](https://github.com/DevDengChao) 贡献 [#222](https://github.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vue3/pull/222)、[#223](https://github.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vue3/pull/223)、[#224](https://github.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vue3/pull/224)、[#225](https://github.com/yudaocode/yudao-ui-admin-vue3/pull/225)
* 【增强】Vue3 管理后台流程实例打印支持更多表单字段展示，包括字典选择器、用户/部门/省市区选择器、日期时间、文件、图片、开关和富文本等字段；普通文本和流程记录使用安全文本渲染，避免被当成 HTML 注入，由 [@芋道源码](https://gitee.com/zhijiantianya) 贡献
MALL 商城专区：
* 【新增】Mall 移动端 `s-layout` 支持定义顶部导航栏背景颜色，由 [@背起行囊](https://gitee.com/wang-w-u) 贡献 [#180](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-mall-uniapp/pulls/180)
* 【新增】Mall 移动端支持根据微信小程序体验版环境，使用 `SHOPRO_TRIAL_BASE_URL` 配置独立的后端接口地址，由 [@背起行囊](https://gitee.com/wang-w-u) 贡献 [#181](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-mall-uniapp/pulls/181)
* 【优化】Mall 移动端优化 Pinia Store 定义方式，由 [@爱宇阳](https://gitee.com/aiyvyang) 贡献 [#178](https://gitee.com/yudaocode/yudao-mall-uniapp/pulls/178)
其它专区：
* 【新增】[Yudao Modifier](https://github.c...
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the YunaiV/ruoyi-vue-pro release v2026.05(jdk8/11), the project adds WMS warehouse management system and completes Vben5 IoT/MES/WMS dual-end adaptation. New features include API access log optimization, MyBatis likeRightIfPresent query, master-jdk21 branch for Spring Boot 4.X, WMS system covering warehouse/SKU/enterprise data, inventory statistics/flow, inbound/outbound/transfer/check orders, web printing and reports, WMS manual, IoT alarm config dynamic template selection, IoT MessageBus RabbitMQ support, Vben5 WMS/MES/IoT dual-end migration, code generator Vben5.0 Antdv Next Schema templates, enhanced process instance printing for Vben5 and Vue3, Vue3 admin UI core dependency upgrade (Vite 8, Vue 3.5, Element Plus 2.13, TypeScript 6), code formatting, Mall mobile s-layout background color, trial base URL config, Pinia store optimization, and Yudao Modifier tool.
